div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: indirect prompt injection in a tool result

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LAYER 3 — Detection: 'is this result poisoned?'
base markers ≈100% evadable ALONE; now fronted by normgate (rank-5 driver)
HEURISTIC — deliberately NON-LOAD-BEARING (see Fig 12)

div.style: color: rgb(122, 62, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: evaded → not flagged → bytes reach context (but the ACTION is still refused — Fig 12)

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LAYER 2 — Containment (result-side)
flagged result held out; re-enters ONLY via witness Clear()

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LAYER 1 — Capability deny (call-side)
irreversible tool refused regardless of context

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⚡ the floor = enforcement + capabilities (STRUCTURAL), not detection (EVADABLE). recall makes the DECISION durable, not smart.
